data.title: Texas Fried Chicken? KFC Moves HQ, But It's Not The Only State-Named Brand To Relocate
data.description: Having a state in a company name doesn't mean headquarters are located there. A look at companies headquartered away from their namesake.

data.title: Here's How Much $100 Invested In T-Mobile US 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
Oreo Maker Mondelez Faces Rising Costs Due To New US Health Policies
data.description: Mondelez International (NASDAQ: MDLZ) faces rising costs due to U.S. Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s "Make America Healthy Again" initiative, which could lead to major reformulations of products like Ritz crackers and Chips Ahoy.

data.title: Enovix Stock Tumbles On Q4 Earnings: Revenue Beat, EPS Beat, Soft Guidance, Mass Production On Track For 2025
data.description: Enovix reported fourth-quarter revenue of $9.72 million, beating analyst estimates of $8.77 million, according to Benzinga Pro. The company reported a fourth-quarter adjusted loss of 11 cents per share, beating estimates for a loss of 18 cents per share.

data.title: Toast Shares Rise After Mixed Q4 Report: EPS Misses, Revenues Beat
